evals.prompt: I just launched a Shopify store selling handmade candles. I have no marketing experience. Where do I start?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend product-marketing-context as the first step, then suggest the beginner starter pack (5 skills). Should NOT overwhelm with all 22 skills. Should ask about budget/timeline/market.

evals.prompt: I want to create an Instagram campaign for my new skincare product. Here's the product page: https://example.com/product
evals.expected_output: Should activate instagram-marketing + social-content in parallel, then copywriting for caption refinement, then social-media-publisher for posting. Should check if product-marketing-context exists first.

evals.prompt: My Google Ads are spending $500/day but I'm getting almost no sales. Help me figure out what's wrong.
evals.expected_output: Should start with page-cro for landing page audit, then ab-test-setup for experiments, then copywriting to apply quick wins. Should focus on available optimization skills.

evals.prompt: 帮我推广产品到中国市场，我卖的是宠物用品
evals.expected_output: Should detect China market intent. Recommend company-research (check Exa API first) + competitive-landscape for research, then social-content with Chinese platform focus (小红书, 抖音).

evals.prompt: I need to write product descriptions for 50 products on my Amazon store
evals.expected_output: Should recommend product-description-generator as the primary skill (supports bulk generation). Should mention the bulk_generate.py script. May suggest copywriting for landing page copy as a follow-up.
